content.body: Spent some time running the robots through the mature draft, Apple's requirements, BSI requirements and the Common Criteria browsers module and then reviewed the results, and asked some questions for synthesis - eg, where did these docs align vs diverge, what was missing or conflicting in the current draft, etc. Above is a screenshot of the summary.
And the full generated summary, in markdown.
I'll sit with this a bit on Monday and do some checking against the originals, for the critical bits.
But worth sharing here, as some folks might have familiarity w/ those source docs and be able to confirm or deny the high level summary.
